toy_selection: Source parsing now prefers ability text (e.g., 'Sting Ray toy')
Toy choices are deduplicated by toy name
No global toy fallback when source mapping is missing
start_of_turn: Gold Fish: increase own sell value
end_of_turn: Hatching Chick: nearest friend ahead temporary +attack/+health until next turn
sell_value: Sell payout now respects explicit pet.sellValue

next_recommended_tiers: Tier 2 reactive triggers (Shrimp, Tabby Cat, Bilby)
Tier 3 faint/summon hooks (Owl, Pangolin, Purple Frog, Toucan)
Tier 4-6 friend bought/sold and perk-gain triggers
